title: Silly Game
description: A five-level roguelike dungeon crawl. Fight monsters, collect gold, find equipment, and descend the final staircase to escape.

title: Treasure of the Cursed Cove
description: A single-island raid: cleave through the cursed crew, unlock the captain's vault, and seize the doubloon hoard before the Kraken stirs.

title: Shadow of the Moonless Castle
description: A single-night infiltration: slip past patrol dogs and samurai spirits, raid the daimyo's vault, then face the Oni in his cistern.
